zh.lifeSummary: 當Ferry II duc de Lorraine於1165年7月7日出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉-阿恭時，他的父親Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine22歲，母親Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast20歲。他於1189年7月與Agnès de Bar在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1213年10月10日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在法國莫瑟勒斯圖爾布洛倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ferry II duc de Lorraine于1165年7月7日出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉-阿恭时，他的父亲Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine22岁，母亲Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast20岁。他于1189年7月与Agnès de Bar在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1213年10月10日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在法国莫瑟勒斯圖爾布洛倫。

nameMeanings.name: Ferry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps a blend of   Derek   and   Terry .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Ferry II duc de Lorraine was born on 7 July 1165, in Brabant-en-Argonne, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, was 22 and his mother, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, was 20. He married Agnès de Bar in July 1189, in Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 October 1213, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Sturzelbronn, Moselle, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ferry II duc de Lorraine est né le 7 juillet 1165, à Brabant-en-Argonne, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Bar en juillet 1189, à Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1213, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Sturzelbronn, Moselle, France.

de.Opole Lubelskie, Opole Lubelskie, Lublin: Opole Lubelskie, Opole Lubelskie, lubelskie, Polen
de.lifeSummary: Als Ferry II duc de Lorraine am 7. Juli 1165 in Brabant-en-Argonne, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine 22 und seine Mutter Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast 20. Er hat im Juli 1189 in Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich Agnès de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1213 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stürzelbronn, Moselle, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ferry II duc de Lorraine è nato il il 7 luglio 1165 nel Brabant-en-Argonne, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Bar nel luglio 1189, nel Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 ottobre 1213, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Sturzelbronn, Moselle, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ferry II duc de Lorraineが1165年7月7日にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-エン-アルゴンで生まれた時，父Ferry Ier duc de Lorraineは22歳，母Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piastは20歳であった。1189年7月にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンでAgnès de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1213年10月10日に故郷で48歳で死去し，フランスモセルストゥルズエルブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.Opole Lubelskie, Opole Lubelskie, Lublin: 폴란드 루벨스키 포일 루벨스키 포일 루벨스키
ko.lifeSummary: Ferry II duc de Lorraine(이)가 1165년 7월 7일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트--아르곤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1189년 7월 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링에서 Agnès de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1213년 10월 10일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 모셀 스투르즈브론에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ferry II duc de Lorraine nasceu em 7 de julho de 1165, em Brabant-en-Argonne, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Bar em julho de 1189, em Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1213, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Sturzelbronn, Moselle, França.

ru.Opole Lubelskie, Opole Lubelskie, Lublin: опол лубелски, опол лубелски, Люблінське, Польша
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ferry II duc de Lorraine родился 7 июля 1165 г. в местности брабант-ен-аргонн, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Bar июль 1189 г. в местности лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 октября 1213 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности стурзелбронн, моселл, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ferry II duc de Lorraine nació el 7 de julio de 1165, en Brabant-en-Argonne, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Ferry Ier duc de Lorraine, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Ludmiła Wierzchosława Piast, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnès de Bar en julio de 1189, en Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1213, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Sturzelbronn, Moselle, Francia.
